sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Corporate Structure & Political Risk Architecture
required_elements: VIE structure assessment and enforceability risk quantification
CCP/state influence and party committee embedding assessment
Data governance exposure mapping (DSL, PIPL, CSL, CAC risk)
National security classification risk and Entity List designation exposure

sections.title: AI Capability Assessment — Beyond the Headline Benchmarks
required_elements: Model capabilities benchmarked against U.S. frontier models
Compute infrastructure sourcing and durability analysis
Data advantage assessment (privileged access analysis)
Talent assessment (publication record, brain drain evaluation)

sections.title: Industrial Policy & State Support Mapping
required_elements: Five-Year Plan alignment and 'New Productive Forces' positioning
Government customer revenue percentage and implicit obligations
Subsidy and tax benefit quantification
International expansion strategy and export control exposure

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation — The Structural Discount
required_elements: Valuation discount decomposition (VIE, regulatory, geopolitical, governance premiums)
Historical discount range comparison
Scenario analysis (base, upside, downside cases)

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Regulatory action tracking (CAC reviews, antitrust fines, data security audits)
Founder event monitoring (retirements, public 'self-criticism')
Divergence analysis (onshore vs. offshore valuations, capital trapped onshore)
U.S. congressional action tracking (PCAOB, HFCAA compliance)

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: VIE enforceability legal analysis track with specialist engagement plan
Compute supply chain mapping (source, durability, AI training infrastructure)
Regulatory action probability assessment (historical CAC/SAMR enforcement pattern analysis)

structural_requirements: All required sections present with markdown headings
VIE structure risk quantified as percentage of enterprise value
CCP alignment signals documented (common prosperity pledges, state funding, party committees)
Scenario analysis matrix present with multiple policy outcome cases
Pattern matching section tracks regulatory, founder, and capital flow divergences
Investigation tracks include specific hypotheses and expert engagement requirements
